sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107413" key="u(perdunasteu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπερδῠναστεύω</orth>, <sense id="n107413.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">exercise predominance,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1414.tlg001:25" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heraclit.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">All.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">25</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
